intent: Flag orders over $500 from customers with accounts less than 30 days old for manual review before shipping, with heightened attention to electronics, gift cards, and expedited fulfillment.
Trigger an investigation when more than three orders are submitted within one hour by the same customer, especially when shipping destinations or payment attempts vary across the burst.
Flag orders where shipping details materially differ from billing or profile country, and prioritize mismatches involving high-value goods or first-time delivery locations.
Flag orders above $200 from customers whose historical return rate exceeds 25 percent to prevent friendly fraud and repeated policy abuse before fulfillment proceeds.
Investigate expedited shipments of high-value electronics when the customer account is new, under-verified, or behaviorally inconsistent with prior purchasing history.
